data.text: Added MCP-level test coverage for `ddx_exec_run` and `ddx_exec_run_log` in `cli/internal/server/server_test.go:2077-2160`. The tool schemas, dispatcher cases, and `mcpExecRun`/`mcpExecRunLog` implementations were already present in `server.go` (lines 3203-3226, 3586-3591, 4341-4365); the new tests exercise both tools end-to-end via the `/mcp` endpoint and pass.
